series_metadata.series_description: Document types in this series include, but are not limited to, Anonymous List/Layoff List (Employee file), Application Certification, Background Check, Civil Service Application, Disability Separation Agreement, Drug Testing Acknowledgement, employee evaluations, Exit Checklist, Fraud Hotline Acknowledgement (HV66), Letters/Correspondence (HR related), Licensure, Certifications, Military Leave forms, New Hire/Orientation/Policy Acknowledgements, OAKS ID form, Retirement forms, Outside Employment, Poll Workers forms, Position Descriptions (Employee file), Pre-Employment packet, Prior Service Form & Information, Promotion/HQ Change/Changes in Position Acknowledgement, Reference Checks, Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Security Access form, Separation/Acceptance letters, Statement Concerning Your Employment Not Covered by Social Security, Supplemental Employment Agreement, Unclassified Services Explanation & Acknowledgement, Unemployment Compensation, electronic or paper Personnel Actions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed ; Electronic: employees date of separation. Separations 1/1/1994 are stored on electronically ; Microform: employees date of separation. Separations prior 1/1/1994 are stored on microfilm
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
